assoc.instance: for any a, b and c, a combined with (b combined with c) equals (a combined with b) combined with c
assoc.paraphrase: when combining three things, it does not matter which pair you combine first

assoc_sw.instance: for any a, b and c, a combined with (b combined with c) equals (a combined with c) combined with b

assoc_sw_i_xy.instance: for any b and c, b combined with (b combined with c) equals (b combined with c) combined with b

assoc_sw_i_xz.instance: for any b and c, c combined with (b combined with c) equals (c combined with c) combined with b

central.instance: for any a, b and c, (a combined with b) combined with (b combined with c) equals b

central_i_xy.instance: for any b and c, (b combined with b) combined with (b combined with c) equals b

central_i_xz.instance: for any b and c, (c combined with b) combined with (b combined with c) equals b

central_i_yz.instance: for any a and c, (a combined with c) combined with (c combined with c) equals c

comm.instance: for any a and b, a combined with b equals b combined with a
comm.paraphrase: combining two things in either order gives the same result

flex.instance: for any a and b, a combined with (b combined with a) equals (a combined with b) combined with a

flex_i_xy.instance: for any b, b combined with (b combined with b) equals (b combined with b) combined with b

idem.instance: for any a, a combined with a equals a
idem.paraphrase: combining a thing with itself gives the thing back

labsorb.instance: for any a and b, a combined with (a combined with b) equals b
labsorb.paraphrase: combining a thing with the combination of that thing and another recovers the other

labsorb_i_xy.instance: for any b, b combined with (b combined with b) equals b

labsorb_sw.instance: for any a and b, a combined with (b combined with a) equals b

lalt.instance: for any a and b, a combined with (a combined with b) equals (a combined with a) combined with b

ldupl.instance: for any a and b, a combined with b equals a combined with (a combined with b)

ldupl_i_xy.instance: for any b, b combined with b equals b combined with (b combined with b)

lperm.instance: for any a, b and c, a combined with (b combined with c) equals b combined with (a combined with c)

lperm_i_xz.instance: for any b and c, c combined with (b combined with c) equals b combined with (c combined with c)

lproj.instance: for any a and b, a combined with b equals a
lproj.paraphrase: a combination always returns its first argument

lselfdist.instance: for any a, b and c, a combined with (b combined with c) equals (a combined with b) combined with (a combined with c)
lselfdist.paraphrase: combining a thing with a combination gives the same result as combining it with each part separately and then combining the two results

lselfdist_i_xy.instance: for any b and c, b combined with (b combined with c) equals (b combined with b) combined with (b combined with c)

lselfdist_i_xz.instance: for any b and c, c combined with (b combined with c) equals (c combined with b) combined with (c combined with c)

lselfdist_i_yz.instance: for any a and c, a combined with (c combined with c) equals (a combined with c) combined with (a combined with c)

medial.instance: for any a, b, c and d, (a combined with b) combined with (c combined with d) equals (a combined with c) combined with (b combined with d)
medial.paraphrase: when combining two combinations, exchanging the two middle elements does not change the result

medial_i_wx.instance: for any a, b and c, (a combined with b) combined with (c combined with a) equals (a combined with c) combined with (b combined with a)

medial_i_wy.instance: for any a, b and c, (a combined with b) combined with (c combined with b) equals (a combined with c) combined with (b combined with b)

medial_i_xy.instance: for any d, b and c, (b combined with b) combined with (c combined with d) equals (b combined with c) combined with (b combined with d)

medial_sw.instance: for any d, a, b and c, (a combined with b) combined with (c combined with d) equals (a combined with d) combined with (b combined with c)

medial_sw_i_wx.instance: for any a, b and c, (a combined with b) combined with (c combined with a) equals (a combined with a) combined with (b combined with c)

medial_sw_i_wy.instance: for any a, b and c, (a combined with b) combined with (c combined with b) equals (a combined with b) combined with (b combined with c)

medial_sw_i_xy.instance: for any d, b and c, (b combined with b) combined with (c combined with d) equals (b combined with d) combined with (b combined with c)

medial_sw_i_xz.instance: for any d, b and c, (c combined with b) combined with (c combined with d) equals (c combined with d) combined with (b combined with c)

medial_sw_i_yz.instance: for any d, a and c, (a combined with c) combined with (c combined with d) equals (a combined with d) combined with (c combined with c)

rabsorb.instance: for any a and b, (a combined with b) combined with b equals a
rabsorb.paraphrase: combining something with a second thing and then with that same second thing again recovers the original

rabsorb_i_xy.instance: for any b, (b combined with b) combined with b equals b

ralt.instance: for any a and b, a combined with (b combined with b) equals (a combined with b) combined with b

rot.instance: for any a, b and c, a combined with (b combined with c) equals c combined with (a combined with b)

rot_i_xy.instance: for any b and c, b combined with (b combined with c) equals c combined with (b combined with b)

rot_i_xz.instance: for any b and c, c combined with (b combined with c) equals c combined with (c combined with b)

rproj.instance: for any a and b, a combined with b equals b
rproj.paraphrase: a combination always returns its second argument

rselfdist.instance: for any a, b and c, (a combined with b) combined with c equals (a combined with c) combined with (b combined with c)

rselfdist_i_xy.instance: for any b and c, (b combined with b) combined with c equals (b combined with c) combined with (b combined with c)

rselfdist_i_xz.instance: for any b and c, (c combined with b) combined with c equals (c combined with c) combined with (b combined with c)

rselfdist_i_yz.instance: for any a and c, (a combined with c) combined with c equals (a combined with c) combined with (c combined with c)

unipot.instance: for any a and b, a combined with a equals b combined with b
unipot.paraphrase: combining any element with itself always gives one and the same result, whatever the element

provenance: v2 (adds single-variable-identification instance laws); certificate-pipeline pipeline/{laws,magma}.py + etp_items.law_nl; certify_all exhaustive<=3 sampled n=4; degenerate excluded; self-pairs excluded; uncertified excluded
